subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who is the Lord of all necks, Who, on the Day of Return, did guide the multitudes, unveiled and unhindered, unto the Most Exalted Horizon [3.5s]... ...Peace and blessings be upon the lord of the world and the cause of the nations’ existence, by whom God revealed the Qur’an and distinguished between truth and falsehood until the day of resurrection
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مالک رقاب را لایق و سزا که در یوم ماب بی ستر و حجاب احزاب را بافق اعلی
subcodes.subjects: @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @justice and wrath of God, @greed; envy; covetousness; attachment to the world
